tech_stack: Python 3.11+, asyncio, MCP SDK, Rich + Textual, SQLite (aiosqlite), Pydantic, Click

codebase_patterns.architecture: Async-first with asyncio. All I/O uses async/await with aiosqlite for DB ops.
codebase_patterns.cli_framework: Click with subcommands. Rich library for terminal output (tables, trees, panels).
codebase_patterns.data_models: Pydantic v2 with Field descriptors for validation. ISO format timestamps.
codebase_patterns.database: SQLite via aiosqlite. Migration-based schema in storage/migrations/. JSON stored in TEXT fields.
codebase_patterns.file_structure: src/mcp_obs/ with subdirs: server/, storage/, utils/, dashboard/, analysis/, alerts/
codebase_patterns.imports: Use 'from src.mcp_obs...' when running as module, 'from mcp_obs...' when installed as package

common_mistakes_to_avoid: Database connection may be None if initialize() not called - always add guard checks before using self._connection
Pydantic fields with defaults should use Optional[T] type annotation if the field can be None
Network message handling needs input validation - add max message size and timeout for reader.readline()
Token estimation using len(str)//4 is rough - document as approximation, consider tiktoken for accuracy
Don't leave temp test files in project root - clean up test_*.py, *_output.txt, *_SUMMARY.md files
SQL parameters list should handle both str and int types correctly when extending params list
effective_patterns: Migration-based SQL schema with version tracking in metadata table
Foreign key CASCADE DELETE for child records (tool_calls -> sessions)
Comprehensive indexing for common query patterns (session_id, tool_name, timestamp)
Async context managers for resource lifecycle management
Rich Tree widget for hierarchical status display
Rich Table for structured data output with styled columns

sessions.review_findings: WARN - Database connection guards needed, input validation on network messages, type annotation improvements
